pr.title: Record: Per-Sample SLOT + TTT + LR=0.024 + Stride=96 — val_bpb 0.63614 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines TTT with per-sample SLOT deltas, higher LR, and stride=96 evaluation to fit the budget while capturing sequence-level patterns.
techniques: Per-sequence hidden-state delta + logit bias fitted on scored tokens
Higher LR (0.024) AdamW steps for better 24-step convergence
Stride=96 evaluation to reduce windows and enable longer SLOT tuning
